title: Forsaken Corpses
body:
![Mod Text Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e59237fc1431e706fe1d8271cc1761c0423f608.png)

</details>



# -- DESCRIPTION --

This mod adds naturally generated skeletal corpses in caves.

There are currently 4 different type of corpses.

Skeletal corpses drop bones when broken.

Some corpses may hold iron, gold or stone pickaxes

# -- PLANNED --
Corpses holding tools such as an iron pickaxe. ✅

More pose variants. ✅

More loot, backpacks near corpses containing treasure.

Nether content. ✅

# -- FAQ --
  
- Q : Can I include it in my modpack? 
- A : Yes, of course!
#
- Q : Can I configure the drop?
- A : Yes you can starting from the 1.0.1 version of the mod. 
- The config file is located in config/lying_skeletons_config.properties

P.S The mod name in files/mod ID is "lying skeletons"
